argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const tweetId = '{{ url }}'.match(/\/status\/(\d+)/)?.[1]; if (!tweetId) return { error: 'Invalid tweet URL' }; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const primary = document.querySelector('[data-testid="primaryColumn"]'); if (!primary) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const article = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article')).find(a => a.querySelector('a[href*="/status/' + tweetId + '"]')); if (!article) return { ok: false, message: 'Reply article not found' }; const moreBtn = article.querySelector('[aria-label="More"]'); if (!moreBtn) return { ok: false, message: 'More button not found' }; moreBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); const hideItem = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]')).find(m => /hide/i.test(m.textContent || '')); if (!hideItem) return { ok: false, message: 'Hide reply menu item not found' }; hideItem.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); return { ok: true, message: 'Hide reply initiated' }; }
async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ ok: false, message: intermediate.error }]; return [intermediate]; }

description: Hide a reply to your tweet
name: HideReply
